description_long: This object is a large solar energy infrastructure installation, featuring multiple rectangular solar panel arrays mounted on a broad, flat platform. The panels are arranged in two main clusters, each tilted at an angle to maximize sunlight exposure, and are supported by robust structural frames. The base platform is bordered by a series of low, crenellated walls, giving the installation a fortified appearance. The surface of the platform is a mix of smooth and textured areas, with some sections appearing slightly raised or stepped. The overall color palette is dominated by dark grays and blacks, with some lighter gray and blue-tinted surfaces, likely representing reflective or glassy materials. The structure is expansive, suggesting it is designed for high-capacity solar energy generation in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A large, fortified platform with multiple tilted solar panel arrays, bordered by crenellated walls and featuring a mix of smooth and textured surfaces in dark gray and blue tones.
description_view_0: From this view, the two main solar panel clusters are visible, both tilted and elevated above the platform, with the crenellated walls framing the installation.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the platform, the angular tilt of the solar panels, and the pronounced crenellated wall sections along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Looking from the opposite end, the arrangement of the solar panels and the stepped platform features are clear, with the walls enclosing the structure.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the symmetry of the installation, the alignment of the solar panels, and the continuous crenellated border around the platform.
attribute_panel_orientation: Panels are tilted at approximately 30-35 degrees, facing a consistent direction, with a fixed orientation.
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with robust steel or concrete support frames and perimeter walls.
attribute_array_configuration: Two main clusters of solar panels, each consisting of multiple panels arranged in a grid-like pattern, separated by a central walkway.
